creator: hoanga@gmail.com
text:
I noticed that asdf-vm was rewritten to use Go (From 0.16.0) https://github.com/asdf-vm/asdf/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#0160-2025-01-30 however what is submitted looks like it is 0.10.2. I think the last bash version was in the 0.15.x line. 

Would it better to bump to the Go version or is there cases where keeping the bash version around would make more sense?
